title: Zcash halo2 — Code Alpha
desc: Detect critical crypto bugs in zcash/halo2 commits before the market prices them in. Inspired by the June 2025 soundness fix that took 4 days to hit price action.
condition: A new commit fixes a critical cryptography bug, soundness issue, or verifying key change in the halo2 circuit — something that could affect ZEC token confidence or require immediate network attention.

title: Ethereum Core Protocol Watch
desc: Monitor ethereum/go-ethereum for consensus changes, EIP implementations, or security patches before the market reacts.
condition: A new release includes an EIP implementation, consensus change, security fix, or gas optimization that could affect ETH network operations.

title: LayerZero Bridge Security Watch
desc: Detect commits mentioning bridge vulnerabilities, reentrancy bugs, or cross-chain security patches before locked value is at risk.
condition: A new commit fixes a bridge vulnerability, reentrancy issue, or cross-chain security bug that could affect locked value or user funds.

title: Curve Pool Contract Watch
desc: Track Curve Finance for math bug fixes, oracle manipulation patches, or pool parameter changes that could affect CRV token confidence.
condition: A new commit fixes a mathematical bug, oracle manipulation vulnerability, or pool parameter issue that could affect CRV token confidence or liquidity.

title: Uniswap V4 Hook Security
desc: Monitor Uniswap V4 core for hook vulnerability fixes, MEV protection changes, or flash loan security patches.
condition: A new commit fixes a hook vulnerability, MEV protection issue, or flash loan security bug that could affect UNI token or protocol safety.

title: Crypto Library CVE Detector
desc: Detect security patches in ethers.js, web3.py, and bitcoinjs-lib — libraries that thousands of DeFi protocols depend on.
condition: A new commit mentions security, vulnerability, CVE, fix, or critical patch in a popular crypto development library that developers rely on.

title: Bitcoin Core Release Watch
desc: Monitor Bitcoin Core for new releases, RBF changes, or protocol proposals that could affect BTC network consensus.
condition: A new release or pre-release includes protocol change, security fix, or BIP implementation.

title: Solana Validator News
desc: Track Solana validator software releases and critical network updates before they hit validator operators.
condition: A new release mentions security fix, consensus change, critical patch, or mandatory upgrade.

title: SEC Filing Watch
desc: Monitor SEC EDGAR for crypto-related filings and regulatory announcements that move markets.
condition: A filing mentions cryptocurrency, digital asset, bitcoin, ethereum, or blockchain.

title: Exchange Status Monitor
desc: Get alerted the moment Kraken or other exchanges report degraded performance or downtime.
condition: Any service shows degraded performance, partial outage, or maintenance.
